rationale: The citing paper references Gauri, Sudhir, and Talukdar (2008) once in the introduction to support a general claim that promotions can attract regular brand customers from other retailers, creating subsidization concerns. This use is grouped with another citation and serves as broad background framing rather than a distinct conceptual or methodological input. The paper does not return to this source in hypothesis development, model design, measurement, or interpretation of results.
